subject: Re: Introduction: Ayrton Mansi | Broadbeach Development Project
snippet: Hi Ryan, Thank you for your email. My other solicitor is still away. Would it be possible to get a brief letter out as you highlighted in our conversation this morning? Potentially to the agent acting
